from arch.config import ModelArgs
from arch.flop_utils import estimate_total_params

configs = {
    'Base-0.4B': ModelArgs\(d_model=1024, d_ffn=3072, head=16, kv_head=4, head_dim=None, n_layers=24, vocab_size=201088, max_seq_len=4096, qk_norm=False, weight_tying=False, gated_attention=False, diff_attention=False, moe=False, yoco_cross_layers=0, universal_loop=1\),
    'GatedAttn-0.4B': ModelArgs\(d_model=1024, d_ffn=3072, head=16, kv_head=4, head_dim=None, n_layers=24, vocab_size=201088, max_seq_len=4096, qk_norm=False, weight_tying=False, gated_attention=True, diff_attention=False, moe=False, yoco_cross_layers=0, universal_loop=1\),
    'DiffAttn-0.4B': ModelArgs\(d_model=1024, d_ffn=3072, head=16, kv_head=4, head_dim=None, n_layers=24, vocab_size=201088, max_seq_len=4096, qk_norm=False, weight_tying=False, gated_attention=False, diff_attention=True, moe=False, yoco_cross_layers=0, universal_loop=1\),
    'GatedDiffAttn-0.4B': ModelArgs\(d_model=1024, d_ffn=3072, head=16, kv_head=4, head_dim=None, n_layers=24, vocab_size=201088, max_seq_len=4096, qk_norm=False, weight_tying=False, gated_attention=True, diff_attention=True, moe=False, yoco_cross_layers=0, universal_loop=1\),
}

# 同时计算 YOCO-0.4B 做对照
yoco_04b = ModelArgs\(d_model=1024, d_ffn=3072, head=16, cross_head=32, kv_head=4, head_dim=None, n_layers=24, qk_norm=False, weight_tying=False, yoco_cross_layers=12, yoco_window_size=512, moe=False\)

for name, cfg in configs.items\(\):
    params = estimate_total_params\(cfg\)
    print\(f'{name}: {params:,} params \({params/1e9:.4f}B\)'\)

params_yoco = estimate_total_params\(yoco_04b\)
print\(f'YOCO-0.4B \(参照\): {params_yoco:,} params \({params_yoco/1e9:.4f}B\)'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
d_model = 1024
d_ffn = 3072
head = 16
kv_head = 4
head_dim = 64  # d_model // head
n_layers = 24
vocab_size = 201088

# Embedding
embed = vocab_size * d_model
print\(f'Embedding: {embed/1e6:.1f}M'\)

# Per layer \(Base\)
q_proj = d_model * \(head * head_dim\)  # 1024 * 1024
k_proj = d_model * \(kv_head * head_dim\)  # 1024 * 256
v_proj = d_model * \(kv_head * head_dim\)  # 1024 * 256
o_proj = \(head * head_dim\) * d_model  # 1024 * 1024
attn_total = q_proj + k_proj + v_proj + o_proj
print\(f'Attention/layer: {attn_total/1e6:.1f}M \(Q:{q_proj/1e6:.1f}M K:{k_proj/1e6:.1f}M V:{v_proj/1e6:.1f}M O:{o_proj/1e6:.1f}M\)'\)

# FFN per layer \(SwiGLU: gate + up + down\)
gate = d_model * d_ffn  # 1024 * 3072
up = d_model * d_ffn
down = d_ffn * d_model
ffn_total = gate + up + down
print\(f'FFN/layer: {ffn_total/1e6:.1f}M \(gate:{gate/1e6:.1f}M up:{up/1e6:.1f}M down:{down/1e6:.1f}M\)'\)

layer_total = attn_total + ffn_total
print\(f'Total/layer: {layer_total/1e6:.1f}M'\)
print\(f'24 layers: {layer_total*24/1e6:.1f}M'\)

# Output head
output = d_model * vocab_size
print\(f'Output head: {output/1e6:.1f}M'\)

# RMSNorm \(tiny\) 
rms = d_model * 2 * n_layers + d_model  # input_norm + post_attn_norm per layer + final norm
print\(f'RMSNorm: {rms/1e6:.3f}M'\)

total = embed + layer_total * n_layers + output + rms
print\(f'Total: {total/1e6:.1f}M = {total/1e9:.4f}B'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
d_model = 1024
head = 16
head_dim = 64
n_layers = 24

# DiffAttn extra: Q翻倍 + lambda_proj
q_extra = d_model * \(head * head_dim\)  # 额外的Q投影
lambda_proj = d_model * head  # per layer
diff_extra_per_layer = q_extra + lambda_proj
print\(f'DiffAttn extra/layer: {diff_extra_per_layer/1e6:.3f}M \(Q额外:{q_extra/1e6:.1f}M lambda:{lambda_proj/1e6:.4f}M\)'\)
print\(f'DiffAttn extra total: {diff_extra_per_layer * n_layers/1e6:.1f}M'\)

# GatedAttn extra: gate_proj
gate = d_model * \(head * head_dim\)
print\(f'GatedAttn extra/layer: {gate/1e6:.3f}M'\)
print\(f'GatedAttn extra total: {gate * n_layers/1e6:.1f}M'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from arch.config import ModelArgs
from arch.flop_utils import estimate_total_params
import config

for name, args in config.model_args.items\(\):
    total = estimate_total_params\(args\)
    
    # 计算非 embedding 参数（去掉 tok_embeddings 和 output head）
    d_model = args.d_model
    vocab_size = args.vocab_size
    embed_params = vocab_size * d_model  # tok_embeddings
    output_params = 0 if args.weight_tying else vocab_size * d_model  # output head
    non_embed = total - embed_params - output_params
    
    print\(f'{name:30s}  total={total/1e9:.3f}B  non_embed={non_embed/1e9:.3f}B  embed+output={\(\(embed_params+output_params\)/1e9\):.3f}B  vocab={vocab_size}  d_model={d_model}  layers={args.n_layers}  yoco_cross={args.yoco_cross_layers}  universal_loop={args.universal_loop}'\)
")

# Base-0.4B
total = 701235200
vocab_size = 201088
d_model = 1024

output = vocab_size * d_model  # output head \(no weight tying\)
non_embed = total - embed - output
print\(f'Base-0.4B: total={total/1e9:.3f}B, non_embed={non_embed/1e9:.3f}B, embed+output={\(\(embed+output\)/1e9\):.3f}B'\)

print\(\)
print\('差异原因: YOCO-0.4B 有 yoco_cross_layers=12'\)

print\('  - 我们 Dense 模型所有 24 层都有完整的 Q/K/V/O proj'\)
print\(f'  - 额外 K+V proj per layer: 2 * {d_model} * 4 * 64 = {2*d_model*4*64/1e6:.1f}M'\)
print\(f'  - 12 layers: {12*2*d_model*4*64/1e6:.1f}M'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from arch.config import ModelArgs
from arch.flop_utils import estimate_total_params

# Base-0.4B \(Dense, yoco_cross=0\)
base = ModelArgs\(d_model=1024, d_ffn=3072, head=16, kv_head=4, n_layers=24, vocab_size=201088, max_seq_len=4096, yoco_cross_layers=0, universal_loop=1, moe=False, weight_tying=False\)

# YOCO-0.4B
yoco = ModelArgs\(d_model=1024, d_ffn=3072, head=16, cross_head=32, kv_head=4, n_layers=24, vocab_size=201088, max_seq_len=4096, yoco_cross_layers=12, yoco_window_size=512, universal_loop=1, moe=False, weight_tying=False\)

d = 1024
h = 16
hd = 64
kv_h = 4

# Per self-attention layer \(both have\):
print\('=== Self-attention layer \(full Q/K/V/O\) ==='\)
q = d * h * hd; print\(f'  Q: {q/1e6:.2f}M'\)
k = d * kv_h * hd; print\(f'  K: {k/1e6:.2f}M'\)
v = d * kv_h * hd; print\(f'  V: {v/1e6:.2f}M'\)
o = h * hd * d; print\(f'  O: {o/1e6:.2f}M'\)
ffn = 3 * d * 3072; print\(f'  FFN: {ffn/1e6:.2f}M'\)
total_self = q+k+v+o+ffn; print\(f'  Total: {total_self/1e6:.2f}M'\)

# YOCO cross layer \(Q + O only, no K/V, but cross_head=32 not 16!\)
print\(\)
print\('=== YOCO cross-attention layer \(Q/O only, cross_head=32\) ==='\)
cross_h = 32
q_cross = d * cross_h * hd; print\(f'  Q\(cross_head=32\): {q_cross/1e6:.2f}M'\)
o_cross = cross_h * hd * d; print\(f'  O\(cross_head=32\): {o_cross/1e6:.2f}M'\)
ffn_cross = 3 * d * 3072; print\(f'  FFN: {ffn_cross/1e6:.2f}M'\)
total_cross = q_cross + o_cross + ffn_cross; print\(f'  Total: {total_cross/1e6:.2f}M'\)

# YOCO shared K/V
print\(\)
print\('=== YOCO shared K/V \(counted once\) ==='\)
shared_kv = 2 * d * kv_h * hd; print\(f'  Shared K+V: {shared_kv/1e6:.2f}M'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Totals \(non-embedding\) ==='\)
base_non = 24 * total_self
yoco_non = 12 * total_self + 12 * total_cross + shared_kv
print\(f'  Base-0.4B:  12 self * 2 = 24 self layers = {base_non/1e6:.1f}M = {base_non/1e9:.3f}B'\)
print\(f'  YOCO-0.4B:  12 self + 12 cross + shared_kv = {yoco_non/1e6:.1f}M = {yoco_non/1e9:.3f}B'\)
print\(f'  差异来源: cross_head=32 vs head=16 → cross层的Q/O投影更大'\)
")

Bash(cd /home/yingbohao/llm-train && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'llm'\)
import torch
from arch.ffn import FeedForwardNetwork

device = 'cuda'
torch.manual_seed\(42\)
ffn = FeedForwardNetwork\(64, 192, nvfp4_mode=0\).to\(device\)
x = torch.randn\(4, 16, 64, dtype=torch.bfloat16, device=device, requires_grad=True\)
result = ffn\(x\)
loss = result.float\(\).sum\(\)
loss.backward\(\)
print\('Baseline backward OK'\)
print\('up_proj grad shape:', ffn.up_proj.weight.grad.shape\)
print\('x grad shape:', x.grad.shape\)
" 2>&1)

import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'llm'\)
from config import model_args, data_args, training_args

print\('=== Model configs ==='\)
for k in model_args:
    if '0.4B' in k:
        a = model_args[k]
        print\(f'  {k}: d_model={a.d_model} d_ffn={a.d_ffn} head={a.head} kv_head={a.kv_head} n_layers={a.n_layers} gated={a.gated_attention} diff={a.diff_attention} yoco={a.yoco_cross_layers} moe={a.moe} nvfp4={a.nvfp4_mode} fp8={a.fp8_mode}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Training configs ==='\)
for k, v in training_args.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: lr={v.learning_rate} min_lr={v.min_lr} max_updates={v.max_updates} warmup={v.warmup_iters} update_freq={v.update_freq} seed={v.seed} save_interval={v.save_interval}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Data configs \(nvfp4 related\) ==='\)
for k in ['debug', 'nvfp4_fineweb']:
    print\(f'  {k}: {data_args[k].data_path}'\)
" 2>&1)
